contract.tile_reducer: precomputed pair_slots[S,K] maps each valid selected row to a compact tile-local active-group slot
contract.scatter: one reduced global atomic row per active compressed group per route tile and D16 block
contract.diagnostic_limit: still consumes materialized [S,K,H] probs and grad_logits; not the fused sparse MLA/LI backward

keep: pair_slots[S,K] metadata contract; it is correct at S128/S512 and only about 8 MiB at S4096 topk512
compact active-group emit shape; it improves grouped_atomic by 1.06x at S128, 1.11x at S512, and 1.13x at S4096
reduced global atomic row target; S4096 preserves the 23.813x modeled write reduction
reject: current compact pair-slot CTA/LDS schedule as the S4096 production kernel: 18.45 ms is still 2.09x slower than the 8.806 ms sparse-atomic wall gate
metadata-only or slot-lookup-only tweaks as sufficient closure; the residual over contrib_sink is still about 9.45 ms at S4096
decision.next_kernel: query-major MFMA producer with lane/warp-level segmented accumulation that avoids dense active-slot initialization and per-contribution LDS stores, or a group-owned cooperative schedule that preserves token-local Q reuse without recomputing segments
decision.next_gate: Beat S4096 sparse atomic dKV wall 8.80629825592041 ms while preserving the 23.813x modeled write reduction and S128/S512 parity
